title: Review documented vision against delivered work
description: Use a same-model sub-agent review to compare approved-doc claims with delivered behavior, evidence level, CSV state, validation evidence, and review log.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN all non-review issues before this row are closed THEN run same-model sub-agent review against source-specific claim/evidence checks; WHEN gaps or overstated claims are found THEN append follow-up issues and REVIEW-02; WHEN no gaps remain THEN close the CSV.
review_initial_requirements: Verify all prior non-review rows are closed before running this review.
review_regression_requirements: Run same-model sub-agent review against approved doc goals, non-goals, acceptance criteria, delivered diff, validation evidence, prior review logs, and source-specific claim/evidence alignment checks. Check if end-to-end processing of JSON results in correct Blender animation execution via MCP.

title: Iterate all requirements into simulation timeline
description: Ensure createSimulationPlan maps each actionable requirement/source action into deterministic macro steps and advances the global timeline per action.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN multiple requirements are provided THEN createSimulationPlan creates deterministic macro steps for each actionable requirement; WHEN the generated script runs in Blender THEN the resulting timeline includes multi-requirement keyframes beyond the single-action case.
review_initial_requirements: Verify every actionable requirement contributes to timeline planning.
review_regression_requirements: Run component tests and Blender MCP multi-requirement script evidence.

title: Tighten requirement parser schema validation
description: Reject invalid priority, invalid status, and confidence values outside 0.0 to 1.0.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN priority is not high/medium/low/unset THEN parseRequirementTable throws; WHEN status is not candidate/confirmed/clarification/rejected/frozen THEN it throws; WHEN confidence is outside 0.0..1.0 THEN it throws.
review_initial_requirements: Verify parser schema validation matches upstream requirement table contract.
review_regression_requirements: Run parser regression tests for invalid enum and confidence values.
